snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2025-70099: lwext4 NULL pointer dereference in ext4_dir_"; content:"CVE-2025-70099"; nocase; sid:6837426; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
